sub_mechanisms: M_1 compute Birkhoff time-average of model-vs-critic loss
M_3 flip dominance via adjusting LR ratio
stripped_llm_application: An adversarial-training diagnostic that uses Birkhoff time-averaging on per-step adversarial loss to detect when one player dominates (ergodic break) and triggers asymmetric LR adjustment to restore competition.
novelty_claim_stripped: Existing GAN diagnostics use mode-collapse indicators (FID). Candidate uses time-average vs ensemble-average divergence as ergodic-break signal.
